cooperates.cooperate_desc: Kagura thrives on grouped enemies, and Tigreal is the perfect setup man. When Tigreal uses his Ultimate (Implosion) to pull multiple enemies into one spot, Kagura can safely cast her full Yin-Yang Overturn combo without missing. This combination results in an instant team-wipe, especially with your Lightning Truncheon AoE procs and Sky Piercer executing anyone who survives the initial blast.

counters.counter_desc:
Kagura struggles against high-mobility Assassins who can dodge her umbrella.
Why Hayabusa wins: Hayabusas Ougi: Shadow Kill makes him untargetable, causing Kagura to waste her burst combo. His shadows also allow him to close the gap or escape her umbrellas tether range easily.
Survival Tip: To survive this, Kagura must time her Blue Skill 2 (Purify/Dash) perfectly to escape his ultimate's initial hits and teleport back to her umbrella for safety.

dominants.dominant_desc:
The Bush One-Shot: Kagura is most dangerous when unseen. Use the 1-3-1 combo from a bush to slow and burst the enemy Mage or Marksman. If they aren't dead, the Sky Piercer will finish them off as soon as their HP hits the threshold. 
Safety First: Use your Blue S2 (Escape) to stay safe while your umbrella is out. This build is glass-cannon; you deal massive damage but cant take hits. Only dash in with Purple S2 if you are certain the kill will trigger.

Targeting: Focus entirely on the enemy backline. With Genius Wand and Sky Piercer, you can effectively "delete" a squishy hero and then use your mobility to reposition.

Snowballing: Since Sky Piercer gains stacks on kills, focus on securing last hits during ganks. The higher your stacks, the easier it becomes to one-shot enemies in the late game.

emblems.emblem_desc:
The Mage Emblem with Lethal Ignition is perfect for Kagura as it enhances her burst damage potential. Kaguras combo can easily hit enemies multiple times in a short duration, allowing Lethal Ignition to trigger consistently and deal extra adaptive damage. This makes it easier to secure kills, especially against squishy targets during mid to late game
Always aim to land full combos to trigger Lethal Ignition quickly

equips.equip_desc:
This is a High-Burst Snowball Build designed to one-shot squishy heroes and shred magic resistance.
Core Synergy
Early Dominance: Arcane Boots and Genius Wand provide flat Magic Penetration to melt enemies before they can build defense.
The Finisher: Sky Piercer executes low-HP targets and scales with kills, making it perfect for snowballing.
The Burst: Lightning Truncheon and Holy Crystal provide massive Magic Power scaling, turning your skills into "one-hit" nukes.
The Burn: Glowing Wand adds % HP damage and reduces enemy healing, ensuring no one escapes with a sliver of health.

hero.hero_overview: Kagura is a high-skill burst mage known for her umbrella mechanics, mobility, and outplay potential. She excels at poking enemies from a safe distance, repositioning with her umbrella, and bursting down squishy targets in teamfights. Kagura is best played in the mid lane, where she can rotate quickly and control objectives. Mastering her skill combos allows her to deal massive damage while staying hard to catch.
hero.hero_strength:
Strong laning and poke ability
	High burst damage with proper combo
	Very mobile and hard to catch
	Has built-in purify (2nd skill) to escape CC
        Good wave clear and fast rotations
hero.hero_weakness:
High skill cap; requires good timing and positioning
	Vulnerable when skills are on cooldown
	Struggles against tanky heroes
	Can be punished by heavy CC after using 2nd skill
	Needs good map awareness to be effective

spell.spell_desc:
Flameshot complements Kaguras playstyle by enhancing her poke and burst potential from a safe distance. Since Kagura already excels at zoning enemies with her umbrella, Flameshot adds extra finishing power to secure kills when enemies escape with low HP. It also gives her a defensive option, allowing her to push enemies away if they get too close after she uses her mobility skills.

Use Flameshot after your full combo to finish off enemies trying to escape
		
Aim from a distance to maximize damage for better kill potential

Use the knockback at close range to create space when being chased

Combine with umbrella poke to continuously pressure enemies in lane

Check bushes safely before engaging to avoid ambushes

Be patient and focus on dealing or killing the opponents damage dealers and watch out for unexpected gank so bush checking is a must (use 1st skill in checking bushes).

dominants.dominant_desc: Kagura is strongest during the mid game once she secures her core damage items. This is the phase where her burst combo becomes lethal and she can instantly eliminate enemy squishy heroes before team fights fully start.

emblems.emblem_desc: The Burst emblem with Lethal Ignition maximizes Kagura’s combo damage and finishing power. Kagura can easily trigger Lethal Ignition by landing her umbrella poke (Skill 1), reposition combo (Skill 2), and ultimate within a short time frame. This guarantees additional adaptive damage after her full combo.

equips.equip_desc: Full burst

hero.hero_overview: Kagura is a high-skill burst mage assassin who excels at zoning, poking, and deleting backline targets. She relies on precise umbrella positioning and combo timing to outplay enemies. Kagura shines as a finisher and teamfight disruptor, capable of instantly eliminating enemy marksman or mage before the clash fully begins. Proper spacing and patience are key to mastering her.
hero.hero_strength:
Strong early poke in lane using Skill 1.

Extremely high burst damage in mid to late game.

Can outplay divers with umbrella dash (Skill 2).

Great zoning control in objectives (Lord/Turtle fights).

Strong finisher — can delete squishy heroes instantly.

Hard to catch when played properly.
hero.hero_weakness:
Very skill-dependent (mechanical ceiling is high).

Weak when umbrella is misplaced.

Vulnerable to heavy crowd control (Franco, Atlas, etc.).

Needs good positioning — one mistake = death.

Not a frontline mage; cannot initiate recklessly.

spell.spell_desc:
Flameshot is chosen to enhance Kagura’s long-range burst potential and provide additional zoning and finishing power. Since Kagura excels at poking and deleting squishy backline heroes, Flameshot allows her to secure kills from a safe distance after executing her combo.

The knockback effect also gives Kagura extra protection against assassins and divers. It can be used defensively to push away enemies when her umbrella is on cooldown, or offensively to reposition targets into her ultimate pull.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal or Atlas: These are her best frontline partners. Their ultimates (Implosion or Fatal Links) pull multiple enemies into a single spot, creating a "perfect match" for Kagura to drop her full 1-3-1-2-3 umbrella combo on the entire clumped-up team.

counters.counter_desc:
These are the heroes Kagura is strongest against:
Eudora / Vale: Kagura can "purify" herself out of their stuns and immediately counter-burst them before they can run away.
Gord / Pharsa: Her umbrella-less dash easily interrupts their long-range channeling ultimates, leaving them defenseless.
Layla / Hanabi: Immobile marksmen have no way to escape her "pull" mechanic or long-range umbrella pokes.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Phase 1: Laning & Poke
Phase 2: Roaming & Gank
Phase 3: Team Fight & Siege

emblems.emblem_desc: This emblem set is a pro-level assassin-style burst configuration for Kagura. While she is a Mage, choosing the Assassin Emblem is a common high-rank strategy because it provides significantly more Adaptive Penetration (+16) and Movement Speed (+3%) compared to the standard Mage

equips.equip_desc: This build is a high-risk, high-reward full burst setup designed to capitalize on Kagura's ability to one-shot backline heroes. By prioritizing flat penetration and massive magic power, it ensures that your full combo including the Flicker trick is lethal against squishy targets

data.recommend: Kagura is a high-skill burst assassin who excels at pick-offs and backline disruption. To dominate, focus on poking with Skill 1 to chip away at enemy health before committing to your full ultimate co

spell.spell_desc: The trick relies on the timing of Kagura's Purple Ultimate (Yin Yang Overturn). When the ultimate is cast without the umbrella, it creates a link that pulls enemies toward the umbrella's location after a short delay. By using Flicker and her second skill to retrieve the umbrella at the exact moment the pull occurs, you "drag" the umbrella—and the attached enemies—to your new position.

counters.counter_desc: She is countered by "Suppression" heroes like Franco or Kaja (who ignore her Purify)
She is countered by "Suppression" heroes like Franco or Kaja (who ignore her Purify)
She is countered by extremely mobile assassins like Benedetta or Lancelot who can dodge her umbrella.
She is countered by extremely mobile assassins like Benedetta or Lancelot who can dodge her umbrella.

dominants.dominant_desc: Focus on clearing waves. Use Skill 1 to poke the enemy mage. Do not jump in unless the enemy is below 40% HP.
This is your prime. Rotate to the Gold Lane. Hide in bushes and wait for the enemy Marksman to overextend, then unleash your full combo.
Stay behind your front line. Use your umbrella to scout bushes for your team. In teamfights, wait for the enemy to use their "hard CC" before you dive the backline.

emblems.emblem_desc:
Use the Mage Emblem for the best balance of Penetration and Magic Power.


Tier 1 - RUPTURE: 
Provides Adaptive Penetration. This makes your early-game poke significantly more painful against the enemy mid-laner.


Tier 2 - BARGAIN HUNTER:
Reduces the cost of equipment by 5%. Kagura relies on expensive items to reach her "one-shot" potential; this helps you get there faster.


Tier 3 - LETHAL IGNITION: 
Dealing damage greater than 7% of a target's Max HP 3 times in 5 seconds burns them. Since Kagura's combo hits many times rapidly, this talent adds a massive finishing burn.

equips.equip_desc:
[ ARCANE BOOTS ] :
- For early-game Magic Penetration.

[ LIGHTNING TRUNCHEON ] :
- Her core item, the extra AoE burst scales with your Magic Power.

[ GENIUS WAND ]
- Essential for shredding the Magic Defense of squishy targets.

[ HOLY CRYSTAL ]
- Provides the massive Magic Power spike needed for late-game kills.

[ WISHING LANTERN ]
- Excellent in 2026 for dealing damage based on the Max HP of the enemy

[ DIVINE GLAIVE ]
- Buy this if the enemies start building Magic Resistance (Athena' Shield).

Glowing Wand: Usually built as a 3rd or 4th item (after Lightning Truncheon/Genius Wand) if you notice the enemy has high sustain or a lot of HP.

Blood Wings: Typically built as a 5th or 6th item (Late Game) to replace your boots or as a final power spike to ensure you don't get shut down during a dive.


💡[ PRO TIPS ]:
-If the enemy team is exceptionally tanky, build GLOWING WAND early. If you find yourself getting focused and killed instantly by assassins, prioritize BLOOD WINGS for that life-saving shield.

hero.hero_overview:
Known as the Onmyouji Master, Kagura is a high-difficulty burst mage from the Cadia Riverlands. She is #25 hero in Mobile Legends Bangbang (MLBB). Mastering Kagura requires a mix of pinpoint umbrella placement and lightning-fast reactions. 



[ HERO SKILLS ]

🌂Passive Skill (Yin Yang Gathering): Upon returning back her  Seimei Umbrella, Kagura gains shield, stuns nearby enemies for 0.5 seconds and then slows then for 1 second.

🌂Skill 1 (Seimei Umbrella Open): Throws the umbrella to a location. This is your primary tool for poking and vision.

🌂Skill 2 (Rasho Umbrella Flee): 
* With Umbrella: Removes all CC (Purify) and dashes.
*Without Umbrella: Teleports to the umbrella and stuns nearby enemies.

🌂ULTIMATE (Yin Yang Overturn): 
* With Umbrella: Deals AoE damage and knocks back enemies.
*Without Umbrella: Creates a link to enemies. After a short delay, it pulls them into the umbrella and deals massive burst.



[ HERO SKILL COMBO ]

The "One-Shot" Combo: 1-3-1-2-3
Execution: Throw Umbrella (1) > Activate Ult (3) > Move Umbrella slightly to ensure the link stays (1) > Teleport to Umbrella to trigger Passive Stun (2) > Activate final ULT burst (3).
hero.hero_strength:
☔Unmatched Mobility: Between her dashes and teleports, she is nearly impossible to pin down.

☔Self-Purify: Her Blue Skill 2 allows her to escape almost any crowd control (except Suppression).

☔Safety: She can check bushes with her umbrella from a distance, preventing face-checking.
hero.hero_weakness:
☔High Difficulty: If you lose track of your umbrella's location, you lose your escape and your damage.

☔Squishy: If caught without her umbrella (while it's deployed), she has no defense.

☔Energy/Mana Management: Spamming skills in the early game will leave you dry quickly.

data.recommend: WHY PROS STILL FEAR KAGURA? Complete KaguraTutorial (S-Tier Guide)

spell.spell_desc:
[ FLICKER ]
- The safest choice. It allows for "Flicker-Combos" or an emergency exit if your skills are on cooldown.



ALTERNATIVE BATTLE SPELL:

[ FLAMESHOT ]
- Excellent for early-game kill secures and pushing back melee heroes like Gusion or Chou.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: She works best with teammates like Tigreal, Atlas, and Terizla, who can group multiple enemies together for her to hit with her massive area-of-effect ultimate.

counters.counter_desc: As she can easily poke Eudora from afar and dodge her stuns using her second skill.
She is weak against suppression heroes like Franco and Kaja, who can lock her down with skills that her "Purify" dash cannot remove
High-mobility assassins like Lancelot are dangerous because they can dodge her umbrella and burst her down while she is defenseless.

dominants.dominant_desc: focus on clearing your lane quickly and using your first skill to "poke" enemies from a distance to lower their health.
Once you have your core items like Lightning Truncheon, you should rotate to other lanes to help your team and use your full "1-3-1-2-3" combo to ambush lone enemies.
Stay behind your tank and use your umbrella to check bushes for danger. Your job is to wait for the right moment to dive in and delete the enemy Marksman or Mage instantly.

emblems.emblem_desc: For Kagura, you should use the Custom Mage Emblem to maximize your magic penetration and power. For your talents, pick Rupture in the first tier for extra penetration, Bargain Hunter in the second tier to buy your expensive magic items faster, and Lethal Ignition as your main talent to deal extra burn damage after hitting your full combo. This setup is the best because it makes your umbrella pokes much stronger and ensures that when you dive in with your ultimate, the enemy has very little chance to survive your burst.

equips.equip_desc: These are perfect for deleting squishy targets in one go. The Arcane Boots and Genius Wand give you massive early-game magic penetration, while the Lightning Truncheon and Holy Crystal provide the high magic power needed to make your umbrella pokes hurt. Finishing with Divine Glaive ensures you can still damage tanks with high magic defense, and Blood Wings provides a huge shield and extra speed to help you survive late-game team fights.

hero.hero_overview:
Kagura is a unique spirit born from the deep longings and memories stored within the Seimei Umbrella, a magical artifact from the Cadia Riverlands. Found as an infant on a rainy day, she was raised by the Scarlet Shadow sect alongside her childhood friend Hayabusa, but she always felt a mysterious power that set her apart from their ninja ways. Eventually, she discovered that she is the personification of the umbrella's soul, carrying the unfulfilled wishes of those who passed before her. Now, she travels the world to experience the beauty of the mortal realm on their behalf, using her umbrella to manipulate Yin and Yang energy to protect her friends and defeat enemies. 

She is a top-tier burst mage who uses her umbrella to poke enemies from a safe distance and pull them into deadly traps. Her playstyle is unique because her skills change depending on whether she is holding her umbrella or has thrown it; throwing it slows enemies, while retrieving it grants her a shield and stuns nearby targets. Beginners should focus on her famous "1-3-1-2-3" combo: throw the umbrella (1), use the ultimate to pull them in (3), reposition the umbrella (1), dash in to stun (2), and trigger the second ultimate burst (3) to delete enemy health bars instantly.
hero.hero_strength: Kagura is a top-tier burst mage whose greatest strength lies in her incredible safety and high mobility. Unlike most mages, her second skill can remove crowd control effects, acting like a built-in Purify that lets her escape dangerous situations easily. She excels at "poking" enemies from a distance with her umbrella to slow them down, and her full combo can instantly defeat squishy targets. Her ability to check bushes with her umbrella and create a massive shield for herself makes her very difficult to kill.
hero.hero_weakness: Kagura is very squishy and can be easily defeated if she is caught without her umbrella, as she loses her built-in "Purify" escape skill when the umbrella is away. Her biggest weakness is Suppression effects from heroes like Franco or Kaja, which she cannot escape even with her skills. She also uses a lot of mana early in the game, so if she runs out of mana, she becomes helpless. Additionally, her main damage combo is predictable and can be dodged by fast heroes with many dashes.

spell.spell_desc: The best battle spells are Flameshot or Flicker depending on your playstyle. Flameshot is the most popular choice for beginners because it helps you finish off low-health enemies from far away and can push back assassins who try to jump on you. Flicker is better if you want to be extra safe or create surprise plays by flashing into range to start your combo. Some aggressive players also use Execute to ensure they get the kill during her full burst combo, but since Kagura already has great mobility, sticking with Flameshot will give you the most utility in lane.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Tigreal's CC from his ultimate skill can greatly compliment Kagura's damage for a group of enemies.
Same with Tigreal, Atlas's CC from his ultimate skill can really help Kagura to use her burst to the fullest.

counters.counter_desc: Lylia's ultimate skill can be a trump card to escape from Kagura damage since Kagura can only perform her burst combo once before it goes on cooldown while Lylia can still deal damage after she uses her ultimate.
Odette's ultimate skill can give her a shield that helps her to evade further damage from Kagura's burst combo while dealing damage to Kagura.

dominants.dominant_desc: During late game, Kagura should focus on utilizing her burst damage. If the roamer for the team is a Setup Tank(Tigreal, Khufra, Atlas, Gatot, Grock), then focus on performing the basic combo and deal damage to the group of enemies that has been stunned by the roamer. If the roamer is a Pickoff Roamer(Hilda, Khaleed, Chou, Jawhead) or a Support Roamer(Angela, Estes, Rafaela, Floryn), then play like an Assassin by hiding in bushes and waiting for either the enemy core or marksman to be offside to take them out before your team can initiate team fight.

emblems.emblem_desc: This is a specific build for a burst damage Kagura. The adaptive penetration can from the assassin emblem can help Kagura to secure kills in the early game without the need of high damage items. The lethal ignition also helps with making sure that Kagura can get a kill even if the enemy manage to get under their turret with a slither of HP left.

equips.equip_desc: This build is made to compliment the emblem used and Kagura's own damage potential. The Glowing Wand is interchangeable with Genius Wand if the enemy doesn't have many sustain heroes and should the need for more damage arises. In late game situation which is 18 minutes and above, you can sell the Arcane Boots for either Winter Crown for safety during team fights or Immortality as insurance in case you get locked on by the enemy team.

hero.hero_overview: Kagura is an A tier mage hero overall but in the hands of a master/pro, she is an S tier hero that could easily turn the tides of war when your team needed it most. Her full kit allows her to be either a DPS mage or a Burst mage. This build is for the burst mage because it is the easier way to learn her mechanic.
hero.hero_strength: Kagura has good range with her umbrella backed with a higher than average damage for a mage/mid lane role. She has capabilities to chase down enemies even when they have mobility skills and she also has immunity for almost every CC skill when her 2nd skill(dash) is used with her umbrella on hand. A combo from a fully kitted Kagura is capable of bursting down even a tanky/sustain Fighter heroes.
hero.hero_weakness: Kagura is a mage at the end of the the day so if she gets stunned or missed her immune skill, then she can be dealt with by a high damage dealing hero. Her skills cooldown also plays a big role in determining if she gets a kill or gets killed.

data.recommend: This is a guide made from experience and hundreds of matches against a multitude of enemy types that can help any beginner looking to not simply be good at a hero but master them.

spell.spell_desc: To further help Kagura with mobility for either a chase or repositioning, Flicker is the best spell due to her burst build already being capable of taking down enemies with ease. If her combo and timing is mastered, Flicker can be used to further enhance her "pulling" / "trapping" skill.

hero.hero_overview: Kagura is a high-difficulty mage in Mobile Legends known for her exceptional mobility, burst damage, and crowd control. Kagura is a high-skill mage in Mobile Legends known for her mobility, burst damage, and crowd control using her Seimei Umbrella. She can poke enemies from afar, escape quickly, and dominate team fights with her dual-form ultimate. Though squishy and hard to master, a skilled Kagura can easily outplay opponents and secure kills.
hero.hero_strength:
✔ High burst damage
✔ Very mobile and hard to catch
✔ Strong crowd control
✔ Great outplay potential
hero.hero_weakness: Kagura is squishy, meaning she can be killed quickly if caught. She is also hard to master and needs good timing and fast hands to use her combos properly. If she misses her umbrella skills or gets silenced or bursted suddenly, she becomes vulnerable. Early game, she can struggle against aggressive heroes and heavy crowd control.

hero.hero_overview: Kagura is a high-mobility, burst-damage mage in Mobile Legends: Bang Bang (MLBB), known for her versatile kit centered around the Seimei Umbrella, which grants her unique positioning and crowd control (CC) capabilities. Here's a detailed overview:
hero.hero_strength:
- Extreme mobility and repositioning potential.

- High burst damage and consistent poke.

- Versatile CC (stuns, slows, knockbacks) and self-protection (shield, debuff removal).

- Can single-handedly turn team fights with well-timed combo
hero.hero_weakness:
- High skill floor—requires precise umbrella placement and combo timing.

- Squishy (low base defense) if caught out of position without the umbrella.

- Mana-dependent early game.

spell.spell_desc: - Flameshot: Fires a long-range flaming projectile that deals more damage the farther it travels. It also slows and knocks back enemies. Useful for finishing kills from afar, disrupting dives, or poking in lane.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Kagura works best with tanky initiators and crowd-control heroes who can start fights and lock enemies in place. Heroes with strong engage skills allow Kagura to safely follow up with her full combo and deal massive burst damage. She also synergizes well with heroes that can peel and protect her, giving Kagura space to reposition using her umbrella and escape skills. This combination makes team fights more controlled and effective.

counters.counter_desc: Kagura has a huge advantage against immobile and squishy heroes. Her mobility, burst damage, and crowd control allow her to dodge enemy skills and punish poor positioning. She can easily outplay opponents by resetting fights with her umbrella mechanics and escaping dangerous situations, making it hard for enemies to catch or burst her down when played correctly.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Tips & Tricks:
During the early game, focus on safe laning and clearing waves quickly while avoiding unnecessary fights. Poke enemies with skills and rotate to help side lanes when possible. In the mid game, use your burst damage to secure kills and objectives like Turtle and towers. Position carefully in team fights—stay behind tanks and wait for the right moment to unleash your combo. In the late game, target enemy backliners and squishy heroes, using magic penetration to deal heavy damage even to tanky opponents.
dominants.dominant_title: Mid to Late Game Power Spike

emblems.emblem_desc: The Mage Emblem with Lethal Ignition is ideal for Kagura because it greatly enhances her burst damage. Kagura can easily trigger Lethal Ignition with her combo, allowing her to deal extra adaptive damage to enemies after poking or bursting them. This emblem strengthens her kill pressure in the mid lane and makes her more effective at deleting squishy heroes during rotations and team fights.

equips.equip_desc: This build focuses on high burst magic damage and armor penetration to quickly eliminate enemies. Arcane Boots provide extra magic penetration early for stronger skill damage. Lightning Truncheon increases burst damage and helps clear waves faster. Sky Piercer boosts damage against low-HP enemies, making it easier to secure kills. Holy Crystal greatly increases magic power, enhancing all skill damage (stacked twice for maximum burst). Divine Glaive allows skills to penetrate magic defense, making this build effective even against tanky enemies. Overall, this build is ideal for dealing massive damage in mid to late game team fights.
equips.equip_title: (It fits a burst mage / magic damage hero)

hero.hero_overview: Kagura is a high-skill Mage hero who excels at burst damage, poke, and crowd control using her Seimei Umbrella. She is known for her mobility, outplay potential, and ability to disengage safely. Kagura is best played in the mid lane, where she can control fights, rotate quickly, and punish enemies with precise skill usage. Mastering her combo timing and umbrella positioning is key to dominating with Kagura.
hero.hero_strength:
Very high burst damage, especially in mid to late game

Excellent mobility with multiple dash and escape options

Strong poke and zoning during laning phase

Can cleanse crowd control with her ultimate, making her hard to lock down

Great at outplaying enemies and finishing low-HP targets

Effective in both team fights and pick-offs
hero.hero_weakness:
High difficulty; requires good mechanical skill and game sense

Squishy and can be punished if skills are misused

Relies heavily on cooldowns and proper combo execution

Weak against heroes with instant burst or long silences

Less effective when falling behind in gold or levels

spell.spell_desc: Flameshot is chosen for Kagura to enhance her burst damage and finishing potential. Kagura excels at poking enemies from a safe distance, and Flameshot allows her to secure kills on low-HP targets after using her skill combo. The knockback effect also provides extra self-peel, helping Kagura create space against divers and assassins.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Early game isu S1-S2-S2 constantly to poke and annoy enemies, leveraging the passive stun.

Positioning use S2 to reposition after a combo; throw umbrella backward to use it as an escape route.

Glowing Wand helps with wave clear; Arcane Boots or Mana Boots are good choices.

Take Flicker if you struggle with survival, as it helps when your S2 is on cooldown.

emblems.emblem_desc: low CD,

equips.equip_desc: this the most best item I create.. early game poke enemy with her first skill after get sky piece you can go solo kill enemy with her combo ( but you need to keep your distance from hero all skill have CC)
if enemy pick to many CC hero , you can use this item. because magic boots, wishing lantern and  enchanted talisman have a reduction CD make kagura can use her second skill twice
my opinion, this item 50/50 for early game but at late game this item eat go far for counter mm, mage and assassin. (prefer for team fight)

hero.hero_overview: Best for finishers, huge damage
hero.hero_strength: kagura strength is high mobility, strong burst damage, and excellent crowd control (CC) via her umbrella, allowing her to poke, chase, and escape effectively with frequent dashes and a built-in purify (passive)
hero.hero_weakness:
High Skill Ceiling: Demands precise mechanics to maximize potentially 
Mana Intensive: Can drain mana quickly if played inefficiently.
Vulnerability: Can be burst down if caught without her umbrella or escape options.
Teamfight: Becomes a "minion" after using her combo until her skills reset.

spell.spell_desc: use flicker to match with her combo and freestyle
